---
title: "Wealth Building"
subtitle: "Budget and wealth-building planners for PhD students on a graduate stipend"
description: "Monthly budget and wealth-building planners, student loan management, and Roth IRA / 403(b) / HSA / 529 guidance — all calibrated for a graduate school income."
order: 2
---

Building financial security on a graduate stipend is challenging but possible. The key is starting early — even small, consistent contributions to an emergency fund and retirement account compound significantly over a 5–7 year PhD program. This guide covers budgeting, saving, investing, and managing debt on a grad-school income.


## Key Financial Milestones for Graduate Students

Work through these roughly in order:

1. **Build a $1,000 starter emergency fund** — protects against unexpected car repairs, medical bills, etc.
2. **Maximize employer retirement match** — if your university offers any match on a 403(b), contribute at least enough to capture the full match (free money).
3. **Pay off high-interest debt** (>7% APR) — credit cards and private student loans.
4. **Build a 3–6 month emergency fund** — equivalent to 3–6 months of essential expenses.
5. **Contribute to a Roth IRA** — up to $7,000/year (2024 limit) if you have earned income (TA/RA W-2). Fellowship income may also qualify — confirm with a tax advisor.
6. **Reduce or refinance moderate-interest debt** (undergraduate loans, if applicable).
7. **Increase 403(b) contributions or direct extra savings to an HSA / 529 plan** if those accounts fit your situation.

---

## 1. Monthly Budget Planner {#sec-budget-template}

> **💾 Cross-page linked.** City and stipend are loaded from [Salary & Cost of Living](salary_and_cost_of_living.qmd). Select a city and adjust your stipend there to populate city-specific estimates here.

Use the interactive budget below. **Check or uncheck line items** to include or exclude them from your budget. City-specific estimates automatically adjust based on the living-wage-based cost index for your selected city.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// Load shared state from localStorage, but allow the user to edit the linked values here.
bud_initial_city_name = localStorage.getItem('phd_city') || 'Austin, TX'
bud_initial_coli_raw  = parseFloat(localStorage.getItem('phd_city_coli') || '100')
bud_initial_coli      = isFinite(bud_initial_coli_raw) ? bud_initial_coli_raw : 100
bud_initial_stipend_raw = parseFloat(localStorage.getItem('phd_annual_stipend') || '30000')
bud_initial_stipend   = isFinite(bud_initial_stipend_raw) ? bud_initial_stipend_raw : 30000
bud_austin_living_wage = 36000
bud_living_wage_per_coli_point = bud_austin_living_wage / 100
bud_take_home_multiplier = 0.88
bud_clamp = (value, min, max, fallback) => {
  const parsed = Number(value)
  if (!Number.isFinite(parsed)) return fallback
  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, parsed))
}

viewof bud_profile = {
  const container = document.createElement('div')
  container.style.cssText = 'display:grid;gap:10px;margin:10px 0 14px;padding:14px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:12px;background:rgba(39,174,96,.04);'

  const title = document.createElement('div')
  title.style.cssText = 'font-weight:700;line-height:1.35;'
  title.textContent = 'Linked city and stipend inputs'

  const helper = document.createElement('div')
  helper.style.cssText = 'font-size:.8rem;line-height:1.45;opacity:.78;'
  helper.textContent = 'These values start with the linked selections from Salary & Cost of Living, but you can fine-tune them here without rechecking each budget line item.'

  const grid = document.createElement('div')
  grid.style.cssText = 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:10px;'

  const fieldStyle = 'padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:8px;background:var(--bs-body-bg,#fff);color:inherit;font:inherit;'
  const makeField = (labelText, input) => {
    const label = document.createElement('label')
    label.style.cssText = 'display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;font-weight:600;'
    const span = document.createElement('span')
    span.textContent = labelText
    label.append(span, input)
    return label
  }

  const cityInput = document.createElement('input')
  cityInput.type = 'text'
  cityInput.value = bud_initial_city_name
  cityInput.placeholder = 'e.g. Austin, TX'
  cityInput.style.cssText = fieldStyle

  const coliInput = document.createElement('input')
  coliInput.type = 'number'
  coliInput.min = '60'
  coliInput.max = '220'
  coliInput.step = '1'
  coliInput.value = String(bud_initial_coli)
  coliInput.style.cssText = fieldStyle

  const stipendInput = document.createElement('input')
  stipendInput.type = 'number'
  stipendInput.min = '15000'
  stipendInput.max = '60000'
  stipendInput.step = '1000'
  stipendInput.value = String(bud_initial_stipend)
  stipendInput.style.cssText = fieldStyle

  grid.append(
    makeField('City', cityInput),
    makeField('City Cost Index', coliInput),
    makeField('Annual Stipend (pre-tax, $)', stipendInput)
  )

  const sync = () => {
    const name = (cityInput.value || '').trim() || 'Austin, TX'
    const coli = bud_clamp(coliInput.value, 60, 220, 100)
    const stipend = bud_clamp(stipendInput.value, 15000, 60000, 30000)
    coliInput.value = String(coli)
    stipendInput.value = String(stipend)
    localStorage.setItem('phd_city', name)
    localStorage.setItem('phd_city_coli', String(coli))
    // Salary & Cost of Living derives cost index from MIT living wage data using the same
    // Austin baseline (cost index 100 ↔ ~$36,000 living wage), so this inverse calculation
    // keeps the shared living-wage value aligned when the budget planner overrides city costs.
    localStorage.setItem('phd_city_living_wage', String(Math.round(coli * bud_living_wage_per_coli_point)))
    localStorage.setItem('phd_annual_stipend', String(stipend))
    container.value = {name, coli, stipend}
    container.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'))
  }

  ;[cityInput, coliInput, stipendInput].forEach((input) => {
    input.addEventListener('input', sync)
    input.addEventListener('change', sync)
  })

  container.append(title, helper, grid)
  sync()
  return container
}

bud_city_name = bud_profile.name
bud_coli      = bud_profile.coli
bud_stipend   = bud_profile.stipend
// 0.88 ≈ 1 − 12% effective federal+state tax rate for a typical U.S. grad-student stipend;
// this keeps the budget planner aligned with the same rough take-home assumption used elsewhere on the page.
bud_monthly_net = Math.round((bud_stipend / 12) * bud_take_home_multiplier)

// City-scaled budget line items
// Base amounts are for cost index 100 (Austin, TX); rent/transport/groceries scale with the shared city cost index
bud_lines_def = [
  // INCOME
  {id:"stipend",   label:"Net Stipend (after taxes)",              type:"income",  base: bud_monthly_net, scale:false, checked:true,  notes:"≈ stipend ÷ 12 × 0.88"},
  {id:"side",      label:"Side Income (tutoring, consulting…)",    type:"income",  base: 0,               scale:false, checked:false, notes:"Enter your monthly amount →", editable:true},
  // NEEDS
  {id:"rent",      label:"Rent",                                   type:"needs",   base: 1050,            scale:true,  checked:true,  notes:"1BR; on-campus may be cheaper"},
  {id:"util",      label:"Utilities (electric, gas, internet)",    type:"needs",   base: 150,             scale:true,  checked:true,  notes:"Avg. $100–$200"},
  {id:"grocery",   label:"Groceries",                              type:"needs",   base: 380,             scale:true,  checked:true,  notes:"USDA moderate-cost plan"},
  {id:"transport", label:"Transportation",                         type:"needs",   base: 120,             scale:true,  checked:true,  notes:"Transit pass or car"},
  {id:"insurance", label:"Health Insurance Premium",               type:"needs",   base: 120,             scale:true,  checked:true,  notes:"City-adjusted; avg. university plan"},
  {id:"phone",     label:"Phone",                                  type:"needs",   base: 60,              scale:false, checked:true,  notes:"Budget carriers from ~$25"},
  {id:"loans",     label:"Minimum Loan Payments",                  type:"needs",   base: 0,               scale:false, checked:false, notes:"Enter your monthly minimum →", editable:true},
  // WANTS
  {id:"dining",    label:"Dining Out & Coffee",                    type:"wants",   base: 120,             scale:true,  checked:true,  notes:""},
  {id:"entertain", label:"Entertainment & Streaming",              type:"wants",   base: 60,              scale:false, checked:true,  notes:"Netflix, Spotify, etc."},
  {id:"clothing",  label:"Clothing & Personal Care",               type:"wants",   base: 60,              scale:true,  checked:true,  notes:""},
  {id:"hobbies",   label:"Hobbies",                                type:"wants",   base: 40,              scale:false, checked:true,  notes:""},
  // SAVINGS
  {id:"emerg",     label:"Emergency Fund Contribution",            type:"savings", base: 100,             scale:false, checked:true,  notes:"Target 3–6 months expenses"},
  {id:"ira",       label:"Roth IRA Contribution",                  type:"savings", base: 100,             scale:false, checked:true,  notes:"Max $583/mo ($7k/yr)"},
  {id:"addl_savings", label:"Tax-Advantaged Accounts (403b/HSA/529)", type:"savings", base: 0,               scale:false, checked:true,  notes:"Sum of 403(b)/HSA/529 set in the Planner below"},
  {id:"debt_ex",   label:"Extra Debt Repayment",                   type:"savings", base: 0,               scale:false, checked:false, notes:"Above minimum payments"},
]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// Build checkbox table — HTML form; OJS reactive on checked IDs
// Editable items (side income, min loan) render an inline number input instead of a static amount.
viewof bud_checked = {
  const typeColors = {income:"#27ae60", needs:"#e74c3c", wants:"#3498db", savings:"#8e44ad"};
  const typeBg     = {income:"rgba(39,174,96,.08)", needs:"rgba(231,76,60,.07)", wants:"rgba(52,152,219,.07)", savings:"rgba(142,68,173,.07)"};
  const groups = ["income","needs","wants","savings"];
  const groupLabels = {income:"💵 Income", needs:"🏠 Needs", wants:"🎉 Wants", savings:"💰 Savings & Investments"};

  const checked = new Set(bud_lines_def.filter(l => l.checked).map(l => l.id));
  const editableAmounts = {};
  const container = document.createElement('div');
  container.style.cssText = 'display:grid;gap:10px;font-family:inherit;margin:10px 0 4px;';

  const emit = () => {
    container.value = {checked, amounts: editableAmounts};
    container.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));
  };

  for (const grp of groups) {
    const lines = bud_lines_def.filter(l => l.type === grp);
    const section = document.createElement('div');
    section.style.cssText = `border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--bs-body-bg,#fff);`;
    section.innerHTML = `<div style="padding:9px 12px;font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;background:${typeBg[grp]};color:${typeColors[grp]};border-bottom:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);">${groupLabels[grp]}</div>`;
    const grid = document.createElement('div');
    grid.style.cssText = 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(210px,1fr));gap:10px;padding:10px;';
    for (const l of lines) {
      const scaled = l.scale ? Math.round(l.base * (bud_coli / 100)) : l.base;
      const card = document.createElement('label');
      // Only set `for` on non-editable cards. Editable cards already have the checkbox
      // inside the label; adding `for` on those cards would cause number-input clicks to
      // unexpectedly toggle the checkbox via the label's activation behavior.
      if (!l.editable) card.setAttribute('for', `cb_${l.id}`);
      card.style.cssText = 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr;gap:8px 10px;align-items:start;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:10px;background:var(--bs-body-bg,#fff);cursor:pointer;';

      if (l.editable) {
        // Restore previously entered amount from localStorage; auto-include if saved amount > 0
        const savedAmt = Math.max(0, parseFloat(localStorage.getItem(`phd_bud_${l.id}`) || '0') || 0);
        editableAmounts[l.id] = savedAmt;
        if (savedAmt > 0) checked.add(l.id);
        card.innerHTML = `
          <input type="checkbox" id="cb_${l.id}" ${checked.has(l.id) ? 'checked' : ''} style="margin-top:4px;cursor:pointer;">
          <div style="display:grid;gap:4px;min-width:0;">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <span style="font-weight:600;line-height:1.3;">${l.label}</span>
              <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;white-space:nowrap;">
                <span style="font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;">$</span>
                <input type="number" id="amt_${l.id}" value="${savedAmt}" min="0" max="10000" step="50"
                  aria-label="Monthly amount for ${l.label}"
                  style="width:76px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:6px;padding:2px 5px;font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;background:var(--bs-body-bg,#fff);color:inherit;">
                <span style="font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;">/mo</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:.77rem;opacity:.7;line-height:1.35;">${l.notes || '&nbsp;'}</div>
          </div>`;
      } else {
        // For the addl_savings card, add a stable id so a reactive cell can update its display
        const amtSpanExtra = l.id === 'addl_savings' ? ' id="addl_savings_amt_display"' : '';
        card.innerHTML = `
          <input type="checkbox" id="cb_${l.id}" ${checked.has(l.id) ? 'checked' : ''} style="margin-top:2px;cursor:pointer;">
          <div style="display:grid;gap:4px;min-width:0;">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;">
              <span style="font-weight:600;line-height:1.3;">${l.label}</span>
              <span${amtSpanExtra} style="font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;">$${scaled.toLocaleString()}</span>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:.77rem;opacity:.7;line-height:1.35;">${l.notes || '&nbsp;'}</div>
          </div>`;
      }

      const cb = card.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]');
      const detail = card.querySelector('div');
      const renderCard = () => {
        const active = cb.checked;
        cb.style.accentColor = typeColors[grp];
        card.style.borderColor = active ? typeColors[grp] : 'var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6)';
        card.style.borderWidth = active ? '2px' : '1px';
        card.style.background = active ? typeBg[grp] : 'var(--bs-body-bg,#fff)';
        card.style.boxShadow = active ? `0 8px 18px ${typeBg[grp]}` : 'none';
        card.style.transform = active ? 'translateY(-1px)' : 'none';
        detail.style.opacity = active ? '1' : '.72';
      };
      cb.addEventListener('change', () => {
        if (cb.checked) checked.add(l.id); else checked.delete(l.id);
        renderCard();
        emit();
      });
      // For editable cards: auto-check when amount > 0, auto-uncheck when it returns to 0
      if (l.editable) {
        const amtInput = card.querySelector(`#amt_${l.id}`);
        amtInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
          const newAmt = Math.max(0, parseFloat(amtInput.value) || 0);
          editableAmounts[l.id] = newAmt;
          localStorage.setItem(`phd_bud_${l.id}`, String(newAmt));
          if (newAmt > 0 && !cb.checked) {
            cb.checked = true;
            checked.add(l.id);
            renderCard();
          } else if (newAmt === 0 && cb.checked) {
            cb.checked = false;
            checked.delete(l.id);
            renderCard();
          }
          emit();
        });
      }
      renderCard();
      grid.appendChild(card);
    }
    section.appendChild(grid);
    container.appendChild(section);
  }
  container.value = {checked, amounts: editableAmounts};
  return container;
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// Reactively update the Tax-Advantaged Accounts card display to show the actual contribution sum.
// Uses wb_accounts_total (defined in the Wealth Building planner cell) to avoid duplicating the formula.
{
  const el = document.getElementById('addl_savings_amt_display');
  if (el) el.textContent = `$${(wb_accounts_total || 0).toLocaleString()}`;
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// Compute totals from checked items.
// bud_checked is now {checked: Set, amounts: {side, loans}} to support editable line items.
bud_active = {
  const bc = bud_checked;
  const checkedSet = (bc instanceof Set) ? bc : (bc.checked || new Set());
  const amounts    = (bc instanceof Set) ? {} : (bc.amounts || {});
  return bud_lines_def.map(l => {
    const isChecked = checkedSet.has(l.id);
    let amount = 0;
    if (l.type === "income") {
      if (l.id === "stipend") amount = bud_monthly_net;
      else if (l.editable) amount = isChecked ? (amounts[l.id] || 0) : 0;
      else amount = isChecked ? l.base : 0;
    } else {
      if (l.editable) {
        amount = isChecked ? (amounts[l.id] || 0) : 0;
      } else if (l.id === "addl_savings") {
        // Auto-populated from the Wealth Building planner's account contribution inputs
        const accts = (wb_403b_monthly || 0) + (wb_hsa_monthly || 0) + (wb_529_monthly || 0);
        amount = isChecked ? accts : 0;
      } else {
        amount = isChecked ? (l.scale ? Math.round(l.base * bud_coli / 100) : l.base) : 0;
      }
    }
    return {...l, amount, included: isChecked};
  });
}

bud_total_income  = bud_active.filter(l => l.type === "income"  && l.included).reduce((s,l) => s+l.amount, 0)
bud_total_needs   = bud_active.filter(l => l.type === "needs"   && l.included).reduce((s,l) => s+l.amount, 0)
bud_total_wants   = bud_active.filter(l => l.type === "wants"   && l.included).reduce((s,l) => s+l.amount, 0)
bud_total_savings = bud_active.filter(l => l.type === "savings" && l.included).reduce((s,l) => s+l.amount, 0)
bud_net_cashflow  = bud_total_income - bud_total_needs - bud_total_wants - bud_total_savings

html`<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(130px,1fr));gap:8px;margin:10px 0;">
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">City</div>
    <div style="font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:3px;">${bud_city_name}</div>
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;opacity:.6;">Cost Index ${bud_coli}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:2px solid #27ae60;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">Income</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;color:#27ae60;margin-top:3px;">$${bud_total_income.toLocaleString()}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:2px solid #e74c3c;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">Needs</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;color:#e74c3c;margin-top:3px;">$${bud_total_needs.toLocaleString()}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:2px solid #3498db;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">Wants</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;color:#3498db;margin-top:3px;">$${bud_total_wants.toLocaleString()}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:2px solid #8e44ad;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">Savings</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;color:#8e44ad;margin-top:3px;">$${bud_total_savings.toLocaleString()}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:2px solid ${bud_net_cashflow >= 0 ? '#27ae60' : '#e74c3c'};border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">Net Cash Flow</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;color:${bud_net_cashflow >= 0 ? '#27ae60' : '#e74c3c'};margin-top:3px;">${bud_net_cashflow >= 0 ? '+' : ''}$${bud_net_cashflow.toLocaleString()}</div>
  </div>
</div>`
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// Real-time stacked bar chart of budget allocation
bud_chart_data = [
  {category: "Needs",   amount: bud_total_needs,   pct: bud_total_income > 0 ? Math.round(bud_total_needs/bud_total_income*100) : 0},
  {category: "Wants",   amount: bud_total_wants,   pct: bud_total_income > 0 ? Math.round(bud_total_wants/bud_total_income*100) : 0},
  {category: "Savings", amount: bud_total_savings, pct: bud_total_income > 0 ? Math.round(bud_total_savings/bud_total_income*100) : 0},
  {category: "Unallocated", amount: Math.max(0, bud_net_cashflow), pct: bud_total_income > 0 ? Math.max(0, Math.round(bud_net_cashflow/bud_total_income*100)) : 0}
].filter(d => d.amount > 0)

Plot.plot({
  title: `Monthly Budget — ${bud_city_name} (Cost Index ${bud_coli})`,
  subtitle: "50/30/20 target: Needs ≤50%, Wants ≤30%, Savings ≥20%",
  width: 560,
  height: 200,
  marginLeft: 20,
  x: {label: "Monthly $ →", tickFormat: d => `$${d.toLocaleString()}`},
  color: {
    domain: ["Needs", "Wants", "Savings", "Unallocated"],
    range:  ["#e74c3c", "#3498db", "#8e44ad", "#bdc3c7"],
    legend: true
  },
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(bud_chart_data, {
      x: "amount", fill: "category",
      title: d => `${d.category}: $${d.amount.toLocaleString()} (${d.pct}%)`,
      tip: true, rx: 4
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```

**Free budgeting tools:**

- [YNAB (You Need A Budget)](https://www.ynab.com/) — free for students
- [Mint / Credit Karma](https://www.creditkarma.com/)
- [Personal Capital (Empower)](https://www.empower.com/)

---

## 2. Wealth Building & Savings Goal Planner {#sec-budget-planner}

> **💾 Cross-page linked.** Stipend is loaded from [Salary & Cost of Living](salary_and_cost_of_living.qmd). The monthly budget planner above sets the realistic ceiling; this planner turns that monthly cash flow into a debt, retirement, and savings-goal strategy.

Use this section to connect your **take-home pay, savings rate, Roth IRA contribution, student-loan strategy, and major savings goal** in one place.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
### Planner Inputs

Use the enhanced controls below to **type custom values, tap quick-select buttons, or step amounts up/down**. Quick-select buttons automatically highlight when selected and deselect when you enter a custom value that no longer matches a preset.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
wb_input_theme = ({
  border: "var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6)",
  bg: "var(--bs-body-bg,#fff)",
  text: "var(--bs-body-color,#212529)",
  card: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(248,250,252,.96), rgba(255,255,255,.98))"
})

wb_format_number = (value, digits = 0) =>
  Number(value).toLocaleString(undefined, {
    minimumFractionDigits: digits,
    maximumFractionDigits: digits
  })

wb_alpha = (hex, alpha) => {
  const sanitized = hex.replace("#", "");
  const expanded = sanitized.length === 3
    ? sanitized.split("").map(part => part + part).join("")
    : sanitized;
  const bigint = parseInt(expanded, 16);
  const r = (bigint >> 16) & 255;
  const g = (bigint >> 8) & 255;
  const b = bigint & 255;
  return `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${alpha})`;
}

wb_chip_css = (active, accent) => `
  appearance:none;
  border:1px solid ${active ? accent : wb_input_theme.border};
  background:${active ? wb_alpha(accent, 0.09) : wb_input_theme.bg};
  color:${active ? accent : wb_input_theme.text};
  border-radius:999px;
  padding:4px 10px;
  font-size:.76rem;
  font-weight:${active ? "700" : "600"};
  line-height:1.1;
  cursor:pointer;
  transition:all .15s ease;
  box-shadow:${active ? `0 5px 12px ${wb_alpha(accent, 0.12)}` : "none"};
`

wb_number_control = ({
  label,
  value,
  min = 0,
  max = 100000,
  step = 1,
  presets = [],
  help = "",
  accent = "#2c7be5",
  storageKey = null,
  decimals = 0,
  format = d => `${d}`
}) => {
  const container = document.createElement("div");
  container.style.cssText = `display:grid;gap:8px;padding:12px;border:1px solid ${wb_input_theme.border};border-radius:14px;background:${wb_input_theme.card};box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(15,23,42,.05);`;

  const title = document.createElement("div");
  title.style.cssText = "font-weight:700;line-height:1.35;";
  title.textContent = label;

  const row = document.createElement("div");
  row.style.cssText = "display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:6px;align-items:center;";

  const minus = document.createElement("button");
  minus.type = "button";
  minus.textContent = "−";
  minus.setAttribute("aria-label", `Decrease ${label}`);
  minus.style.cssText = wb_chip_css(false, accent) + "min-width:34px;padding:7px 0;font-size:.95rem;";

  const inputWrap = document.createElement("div");
  inputWrap.style.cssText = `display:grid;gap:4px;padding:9px 11px;border:1px solid ${wb_input_theme.border};border-radius:12px;background:${wb_input_theme.bg};`;

  const input = document.createElement("input");
  input.type = "number";
  input.min = String(min);
  input.max = String(max);
  input.step = String(step);
  input.inputMode = decimals > 0 ? "decimal" : "numeric";
  input.style.cssText = "width:100%;border:0;outline:none;background:transparent;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;padding:0;";

  const summary = document.createElement("div");
  summary.style.cssText = `font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;color:${accent};`;

  inputWrap.append(input, summary);

  const plus = document.createElement("button");
  plus.type = "button";
  plus.textContent = "+";
  plus.setAttribute("aria-label", `Increase ${label}`);
  plus.style.cssText = wb_chip_css(false, accent) + "min-width:34px;padding:7px 0;font-size:.95rem;";

  row.append(minus, inputWrap, plus);

  const chips = document.createElement("div");
  chips.style.cssText = "display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;";

  const hint = document.createElement("div");
  hint.style.cssText = "font-size:.78rem;line-height:1.4;opacity:.72;";

  const initialValue = decimals > 0 ? Number(Number(value).toFixed(decimals)) : Math.round(value);

  const normalize = raw => {
    const numeric = Number(raw);
    const fallback = typeof container.value === "number" ? container.value : initialValue;
    if (!Number.isFinite(numeric)) return fallback;
    const bounded = Math.min(max, Math.max(min, numeric));
    return decimals > 0 ? Number(bounded.toFixed(decimals)) : Math.round(bounded);
  };

  const presetButtons = presets.map(preset => {
    const button = document.createElement("button");
    button.type = "button";
    button.textContent = format(preset);
    button.setAttribute("aria-pressed", "false");
    button.addEventListener("click", () => updateValue(preset));
    chips.appendChild(button);
    return {button, preset};
  });

  const updateValue = next => {
    const normalized = normalize(next);
    container.value = normalized;
    input.value = normalized.toFixed(decimals);
    summary.textContent = `Current selection: ${format(normalized)}`;
    hint.textContent = help;
    for (const {button, preset} of presetButtons) {
      button.style.cssText = wb_chip_css(normalized === preset, accent);
      button.setAttribute("aria-pressed", normalized === preset ? "true" : "false");
    }
    if (storageKey) localStorage.setItem(storageKey, String(normalized));
    container.dispatchEvent(new Event("input"));
  };

  const syncFromInput = restoreCurrent => {
    if (input.value === "") {
      if (restoreCurrent) input.value = normalize(container.value).toFixed(decimals);
      return;
    }
    updateValue(input.value);
  };

  minus.addEventListener("click", () => updateValue(container.value - step));
  plus.addEventListener("click", () => updateValue(container.value + step));
  input.addEventListener("input", () => syncFromInput(false));
  input.addEventListener("change", () => syncFromInput(true));

  container.append(title, row);
  if (presets.length) container.append(chips);
  container.append(hint);
  updateValue(initialValue);
  return container;
}

wb_choice_control = ({
  label,
  value,
  options,
  help = "",
  accent = "#6f42c1"
}) => {
  const container = document.createElement("div");
  container.style.cssText = `display:grid;gap:8px;padding:12px;border:1px solid ${wb_input_theme.border};border-radius:14px;background:${wb_input_theme.card};box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(15,23,42,.05);`;

  const title = document.createElement("div");
  title.style.cssText = "font-weight:700;line-height:1.35;";
  title.textContent = label;

  const chips = document.createElement("div");
  chips.style.cssText = "display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;";

  const hint = document.createElement("div");
  hint.style.cssText = "font-size:.78rem;line-height:1.4;opacity:.72;";
  hint.textContent = help;

  const buttons = options.map(option => {
    const button = document.createElement("button");
    button.type = "button";
    button.textContent = option;
    button.setAttribute("aria-pressed", "false");
    button.addEventListener("click", () => updateValue(option));
    chips.appendChild(button);
    return {button, option};
  });

  const updateValue = next => {
    container.value = next;
    for (const {button, option} of buttons) {
      button.style.cssText = wb_chip_css(next === option, accent);
      button.setAttribute("aria-pressed", next === option ? "true" : "false");
    }
    container.dispatchEvent(new Event("input"));
  };

  container.append(title, chips, hint);
  updateValue(value);
  return container;
}
```

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
wb_stipend_init = parseFloat(localStorage.getItem('phd_annual_stipend') || '30000')

viewof wb_stipend = {
  const options = [15000,16000,17000,18000,19000,20000,21000,22000,23000,24000,25000,26000,27000,28000,29000,30000,31000,32000,33000,34000,35000,36000,37000,38000,39000,40000,42000,44000,46000,48000,50000,52000,54000,56000,58000,60000];
  const initVal = isFinite(wb_stipend_init) ? wb_stipend_init : 30000;
  const nearest = options.reduce((a,b) => Math.abs(b-initVal)<Math.abs(a-initVal)?b:a, 30000);
  return wb_number_control({
    label: "Annual Stipend (pre-tax, $) — override if needed",
    value: nearest,
    min: 15000,
    max: 60000,
    step: 1000,
    presets: [20000, 25000, 30000, 35000, 40000, 50000],
    help: "Type any stipend amount or tap a quick-select button.",
    accent: "#27ae60",
    storageKey: "phd_annual_stipend",
    format: d => `$${wb_format_number(d)}`
  });
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof wb_savings_pct = wb_number_control({
  label: "Savings, debt payoff & goal allocation (% of take-home)",
  value: 15,
  min: 0,
  max: 40,
  step: 1,
  presets: [5, 8, 10, 12, 15, 18, 20, 25, 30],
  help: "Quick buttons deselect automatically when you enter a custom percentage.",
  accent: "#8e44ad",
  format: d => `${d}%`
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof wb_ira_monthly = {
  const saved = parseFloat(localStorage.getItem('phd_ira_monthly') || '100');
  const options = [0, 25, 50, 75, 100, 125, 150, 200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550, 583];
  const initSaved = isFinite(saved) ? saved : 100;
  const nearest = options.reduce((a,b) => Math.abs(b-initSaved)<Math.abs(a-initSaved)?b:a, 100);
  return wb_number_control({
    label: "Monthly Roth IRA Contribution ($) — max $583/mo to hit $7,000/yr limit",
    value: nearest,
    min: 0,
    max: 583,
    step: 25,
    presets: [0, 50, 100, 150, 250, 400, 583],
    help: "Use quick amounts or type a custom monthly contribution.",
    accent: "#8e44ad",
    storageKey: "phd_ira_monthly",
    format: d => `$${wb_format_number(d)}/mo`
  });
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof wb_extra_loan_payment = wb_number_control({
  label: "Extra student-loan payment ($/mo)",
  value: 100,
  min: 0,
  max: 1000,
  step: 25,
  presets: [0, 50, 100, 150, 250, 400, 500],
  help: "Set this to $0 to pause extra payments while keeping minimums in your budget plan.",
  accent: "#e67e22",
  format: d => d === 0 ? "None" : `$${wb_format_number(d)}/mo`
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof wb_goal_share = wb_number_control({
  label: "Share of remaining savings directed to your current goal",
  value: 60,
  min: 0,
  max: 100,
  step: 5,
  presets: [0, 25, 40, 50, 60, 75, 100],
  help: "Choose 0% if you want to temporarily deselect goal funding and route savings elsewhere.",
  accent: "#f39c12",
  format: d => `${d}%`
})
```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof wb_403b_monthly = {
  const saved = parseFloat(localStorage.getItem('phd_403b_monthly') || '0');
  const initVal = isFinite(saved) ? saved : 0;
  return wb_number_control({
    label: "Monthly 403(b) Contribution ($) — max $1,917/mo ($23,000/yr)",
    value: initVal,
    min: 0,
    max: 1917,
    step: 25,
    presets: [0, 50, 100, 200, 300, 500, 1000, 1917],
    help: "Prioritize if your university offers an employer match. Pre-tax; taxed on withdrawal.",
    accent: "#3498db",
    storageKey: "phd_403b_monthly",
    format: d => d === 0 ? "None" : `$${wb_format_number(d)}/mo`
  });
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof wb_hsa_monthly = {
  const saved = parseFloat(localStorage.getItem('phd_hsa_monthly') || '0');
  const initVal = isFinite(saved) ? saved : 0;
  return wb_number_control({
    label: "Monthly HSA Contribution ($) — max $346/mo ($4,150/yr individual)",
    value: initVal,
    min: 0,
    max: 346,
    step: 25,
    presets: [0, 25, 50, 100, 175, 250, 346],
    help: "Requires a qualifying high-deductible health plan (HDHP). Triple tax advantage.",
    accent: "#27ae60",
    storageKey: "phd_hsa_monthly",
    format: d => d === 0 ? "None" : `$${wb_format_number(d)}/mo`
  });
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof wb_529_monthly = {
  const saved = parseFloat(localStorage.getItem('phd_529_monthly') || '0');
  const initVal = isFinite(saved) ? saved : 0;
  return wb_number_control({
    label: "Monthly 529 Plan Contribution ($)",
    value: initVal,
    min: 0,
    max: 1500,
    step: 25,
    presets: [0, 25, 50, 100, 200, 300, 500],
    help: "Tax-free growth for qualified education expenses. No federal annual cap.",
    accent: "#e67e22",
    storageKey: "phd_529_monthly",
    format: d => d === 0 ? "None" : `$${wb_format_number(d)}/mo`
  });
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof sg_goal_type = wb_choice_control({
  label: "Current savings goal",
  value: "🏠 House Down Payment",
  options: ["🏠 House Down Payment", "🚗 Car Purchase", "👶 Family / Childcare", "✈️ Other Goal"],
  help: "The selected goal drives the timeline and projection cards below.",
  accent: "#f39c12"
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
sg_goal_defaults = ({
  "🏠 House Down Payment": {target: 30000, label: "Down payment (10–20% of home price)"},
  "🚗 Car Purchase":       {target: 8000,  label: "Used car cash purchase or down payment"},
  "👶 Family / Childcare": {target: 12000, label: "Birth, leave, or childcare buffer"},
  "✈️ Other Goal":         {target: 5000,  label: "Custom savings target"}
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
sg_goal_info = sg_goal_defaults[sg_goal_type]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof sg_target = wb_number_control({
  label: `Target Amount ($) — ${sg_goal_info.label}`,
  value: sg_goal_info.target,
  min: 2000,
  max: 150000,
  step: 500,
  presets: [5000, 8000, 12000, 20000, 30000, 50000, 100000],
  help: "Enter any goal amount to match your actual target.",
  accent: "#f39c12",
  format: d => `$${wb_format_number(d)}`
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof sg_rate = wb_number_control({
  label: "Annual Interest / HYSA Rate (%)",
  value: 4.5,
  min: 0,
  max: 10,
  step: 0.1,
  presets: [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 4.5, 5, 5.5],
  help: "Type a current HYSA or CD rate for a custom projection.",
  accent: "#27ae60",
  decimals: 1,
  format: d => `${wb_format_number(d, 1)}%`
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof sg_existing = wb_number_control({
  label: "Existing savings toward this goal ($)",
  value: 0,
  min: 0,
  max: 150000,
  step: 250,
  presets: [0, 500, 1000, 2500, 5000, 7500, 10000],
  help: "Type what you already have saved so the timeline starts from the right place.",
  accent: "#27ae60",
  format: d => `$${wb_format_number(d)}`
})
```

:::
:::
:::

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
### Shared Home Goal Inputs

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="33%"}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof wb_home_target = {
  const options = [5000, 10000, 15000, 20000, 25000, 30000, 35000, 40000, 50000, 60000, 75000, 100000, 125000];
  const saved = parseFloat(localStorage.getItem('phd_home_goal_target') || '30000');
  const initVal = isFinite(saved) ? saved : 30000;
  const nearest = options.reduce((a, b) => Math.abs(b - initVal) < Math.abs(a - initVal) ? b : a, 30000);
  return wb_number_control({
    label: "Shared home down payment target ($) — also used in Family Planning",
    value: nearest,
    min: 5000,
    max: 150000,
    step: 1000,
    presets: [10000, 20000, 30000, 50000, 75000, 100000],
    help: "This value stays synced with the Family Planning page.",
    accent: "#3498db",
    storageKey: "phd_home_goal_target",
    format: d => `$${wb_format_number(d)}`
  });
}
```

:::
::: {.column width="33%"}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof wb_home_rate = {
  const options = [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 4.5, 5, 5.5];
  const saved = parseFloat(localStorage.getItem('phd_home_goal_rate') || '4.5');
  const initVal = isFinite(saved) ? saved : 4.5;
  const nearest = options.reduce((a, b) => Math.abs(b - initVal) < Math.abs(a - initVal) ? b : a, 4.5);
  return wb_number_control({
    label: "Shared home-fund APY (%) — also used in Family Planning",
    value: nearest,
    min: 0,
    max: 10,
    step: 0.1,
    presets: [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 4.5, 5, 5.5],
    help: "Use the same APY here and in Family Planning for a consistent timeline.",
    accent: "#27ae60",
    storageKey: "phd_home_goal_rate",
    decimals: 1,
    format: d => `${wb_format_number(d, 1)}%`
  });
}
```

:::
::: {.column width="33%"}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof wb_home_existing = {
  const options = [0, 1000, 2500, 5000, 7500, 10000, 15000, 20000, 25000, 30000, 40000, 50000];
  const saved = parseFloat(localStorage.getItem('phd_home_goal_existing') || '0');
  const initVal = isFinite(saved) ? saved : 0;
  const nearest = options.reduce((a, b) => Math.abs(b - initVal) < Math.abs(a - initVal) ? b : a, 0);
  return wb_number_control({
    label: "Existing home savings ($) — also used in Family Planning",
    value: nearest,
    min: 0,
    max: 100000,
    step: 500,
    presets: [0, 1000, 2500, 5000, 10000, 20000, 30000, 50000],
    help: "Keep this synced with your actual home-fund balance across both pages.",
    accent: "#3498db",
    storageKey: "phd_home_goal_existing",
    format: d => `$${wb_format_number(d)}`
  });
}
```

:::
:::
:::

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// 0.88 ≈ 1 − 12% effective federal+state tax rate typical for grad-student income bracket
wb_monthly_net  = Math.round((wb_stipend / 12) * 0.88)
wb_needs_pct    = Math.max(45, 80 - wb_savings_pct)
wb_wants_pct    = 100 - wb_savings_pct - wb_needs_pct
wb_needs_amt    = Math.round(wb_monthly_net * wb_needs_pct  / 100)
wb_wants_amt    = Math.round(wb_monthly_net * wb_wants_pct  / 100)
wb_savings_amt  = Math.round(wb_monthly_net * wb_savings_pct / 100)

// Pull savings + surplus from the Monthly Budget Planner above so this section stays connected to those selections.
wb_budget_capacity = bud_total_savings + Math.max(0, bud_net_cashflow)
wb_alignment_gap   = wb_budget_capacity - wb_savings_amt

// Total of independently-set tax-advantaged account contributions
wb_accounts_total    = (wb_403b_monthly || 0) + (wb_hsa_monthly || 0) + (wb_529_monthly || 0)
// Savings available for emergency fund / IRA / debt / goal after dedicated account contributions
wb_savings_available = Math.max(0, wb_savings_amt - wb_accounts_total)
wb_emergency_monthly = Math.round(wb_savings_available * 0.35)
wb_ira_effective     = Math.min(wb_ira_monthly, Math.max(0, Math.round(wb_savings_available * 0.5)))
wb_after_core        = Math.max(0, wb_savings_available - wb_emergency_monthly - wb_ira_effective)
wb_debt_monthly      = Math.min(wb_extra_loan_payment, wb_after_core)
wb_after_debt        = Math.max(0, wb_after_core - wb_debt_monthly)
wb_goal_monthly      = Math.round(wb_after_debt * wb_goal_share / 100)

html`<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-top:14px;">
  <div style="padding:14px 10px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;opacity:.6">Take-Home/mo</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px;">$${wb_monthly_net}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:14px 10px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;opacity:.6">Budget Planner Capacity</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px;">$${wb_budget_capacity.toLocaleString()}</div>
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;opacity:.65;">Savings selected + surplus above</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:14px 10px;border:2px solid #27ae60;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;opacity:.6">Wealth Plan Target</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px;color:#27ae60;">$${wb_savings_amt}</div>
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;opacity:.65;">${wb_savings_pct}% of take-home</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:14px 10px;border:2px solid #8e44ad;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;opacity:.6">Roth IRA</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px;color:#8e44ad;">$${wb_ira_effective}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:14px 10px;border:2px solid #e67e22;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;opacity:.6">Extra Loan Payment</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px;color:#e67e22;">$${wb_debt_monthly}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:14px 10px;border:2px solid #f39c12;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;opacity:.6">Goal Savings</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px;color:#f39c12;">$${wb_goal_monthly}</div>
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;opacity:.65;">${sg_goal_type}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:14px 10px;border:2px solid #3498db;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;opacity:.6">403(b)</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px;color:#3498db;">$${wb_403b_monthly || 0}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:14px 10px;border:2px solid #27ae60;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;opacity:.6">HSA</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px;color:#27ae60;">$${wb_hsa_monthly || 0}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:14px 10px;border:2px solid #e67e22;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;opacity:.6">529 Plan</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px;color:#e67e22;">$${wb_529_monthly || 0}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:14px 10px;border:2px solid ${wb_alignment_gap >= 0 ? '#27ae60' : '#e74c3c'};border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;opacity:.6">Planner Alignment</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px;color:${wb_alignment_gap >= 0 ? '#27ae60' : '#e74c3c'};">${wb_alignment_gap >= 0 ? 'Within budget' : 'Needs more room'}</div>
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;opacity:.65;">${wb_alignment_gap >= 0 ? `$${wb_alignment_gap.toLocaleString()}/mo left over` : `$${Math.abs(wb_alignment_gap).toLocaleString()}/mo short`}</div>
  </div>
</div>`
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

### 💰 Budget Breakdown

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
budget_categories = [
  {category: "Rent & Housing",        amount: Math.round(wb_needs_amt * 0.52), type: "Needs"},
  {category: "Groceries",             amount: Math.round(wb_needs_amt * 0.17), type: "Needs"},
  {category: "Utilities & Phone",     amount: Math.round(wb_needs_amt * 0.12), type: "Needs"},
  {category: "Transportation",        amount: Math.round(wb_needs_amt * 0.11), type: "Needs"},
  {category: "Health Insurance",      amount: Math.round(wb_needs_amt * 0.08), type: "Needs"},
  {category: "Dining & Coffee",       amount: Math.round(wb_wants_amt * 0.40), type: "Wants"},
  {category: "Entertainment & Subs.", amount: Math.round(wb_wants_amt * 0.32), type: "Wants"},
  {category: "Clothing & Personal",   amount: Math.round(wb_wants_amt * 0.28), type: "Wants"},
  {category: "Emergency Fund",        amount: wb_emergency_monthly, type: "Savings"},
  {category: "Roth IRA",              amount: wb_ira_effective, type: "Savings"},
  {category: "Debt Repayment",        amount: wb_debt_monthly, type: "Savings"},
  {category: "Goal Savings",          amount: wb_goal_monthly, type: "Savings"},
  {category: "403(b)",                amount: wb_403b_monthly || 0, type: "Savings"},
  {category: "HSA",                   amount: wb_hsa_monthly || 0, type: "Savings"},
  {category: "529 Plan",              amount: wb_529_monthly || 0, type: "Savings"}
].filter(d => d.amount > 0)

Plot.plot({
  title: "Monthly Budget Breakdown (needs, wants, and wealth plan)",
  width: 580,
  height: 380,
  marginLeft: 200,
  x: {label: "Monthly $ →"},
  color: {
    domain: ["Needs", "Wants", "Savings"],
    range: ["#e74c3c", "#3498db", "#27ae60"],
    legend: true
  },
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(budget_categories, {
      x: "amount", y: "category", fill: "type",
      sort: {y: "x", reverse: true}, rx: 3, tip: true
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```

### 📈 Roth IRA Growth Projection

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
ret_years = Array.from({length: 36}, (_, i) => i)
contrib_levels = [50, 100, wb_ira_effective, 200, 300]
  .filter((v, i, a) => a.indexOf(v) === i)
  .sort((a, b) => a - b)

compound_data = contrib_levels.flatMap(monthly =>
  ret_years.map(year => ({
    year,
    monthly,
    value: Math.round(monthly * ((Math.pow(1 + 0.07/12, year * 12) - 1) / (0.07/12))),
    label: `$${monthly}/mo`
  }))
)

Plot.plot({
  title: "Roth IRA Growth at 7% Average Annual Return",
  subtitle: "Assumes consistent monthly contributions; your selected amount highlighted.",
  width: 600,
  height: 320,
  x: {label: "Years of Contributions →"},
  y: {label: "Portfolio Value ($) →", tickFormat: d => `$${(d/1000).toFixed(0)}k`},
  color: {
    domain: contrib_levels.map(m => `$${m}/mo`),
    legend: true
  },
  marks: [
    Plot.line(compound_data, {
      x: "year", y: "value",
      stroke: d => `$${d.monthly}/mo`,
      strokeWidth: d => d.monthly === wb_ira_effective ? 3.5 : 1.5,
      strokeOpacity: d => d.monthly === wb_ira_effective ? 1 : 0.5,
      tip: true
    }),
    Plot.dot(
      compound_data.filter(d => d.monthly === wb_ira_effective && d.year % 5 === 0),
      {x: "year", y: "value", fill: "#f39c12", r: 5, tip: true}
    )
  ]
})
```

### 🎯 Goal Timeline & Emergency Fund

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
milestone_months = Array.from({length: 61}, (_, i) => i)

milestones_data = milestone_months.map(m => ({
  month: m,
  emergency_1k:  Math.min(wb_emergency_monthly * m, 1000),
  emergency_3mo: Math.min(wb_emergency_monthly * m, wb_monthly_net * 3),
  emergency_6mo: Math.min(wb_emergency_monthly * m, wb_monthly_net * 6)
}))

milestones_tidy = milestones_data.flatMap(d => [
  {month: d.month, value: d.emergency_1k,  series: "$1,000 Starter Fund"},
  {month: d.month, value: d.emergency_3mo, series: "3-Month Emergency Fund ($" + (wb_monthly_net*3).toLocaleString() + ")"},
  {month: d.month, value: d.emergency_6mo, series: "6-Month Emergency Fund ($" + (wb_monthly_net*6).toLocaleString() + ")"}
])

sg_monthly = wb_goal_monthly
sg_monthly_rate = sg_rate / 100 / 12

sg_months_needed = (() => {
  if (sg_existing >= sg_target) return 0;
  if (sg_monthly <= 0 && sg_monthly_rate <= 0) return null;
  let balance = sg_existing;
  for (let m = 1; m <= 600; m++) {
    balance = balance * (1 + sg_monthly_rate) + sg_monthly;
    if (balance >= sg_target) return m;
  }
  return null;
})()

sg_projection = Array.from({length: Math.min((sg_months_needed ?? 120) + 1, 361)}, (_, m) => {
  const growthFactor = Math.pow(1 + sg_monthly_rate, m);
  const principal = sg_existing + sg_monthly * m;
  const balance = sg_existing * growthFactor
    + (sg_monthly_rate > 0 ? sg_monthly * (growthFactor - 1) / sg_monthly_rate : sg_monthly * m);
  const interest = Math.round(Math.max(0, balance - principal));
  return {month: m, balance: Math.round(balance), principal: Math.round(principal), interest};
})

sg_months_text = sg_existing >= sg_target
  ? "Already funded"
  : sg_months_needed
    ? `${sg_months_needed} months (${(sg_months_needed/12).toFixed(1)} years)`
    : "Not yet funded — increase savings or lower debt allocation"

sg_final_balance = sg_projection[sg_projection.length - 1]?.balance ?? 0
sg_interest_earned = sg_projection[sg_projection.length - 1]?.interest ?? 0

html`<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(130px,1fr));gap:8px;margin:12px 0;">
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:2px solid #f39c12;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">Goal</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;color:#f39c12;margin-top:3px;">$${sg_target.toLocaleString()}</div>
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;opacity:.65;">${sg_goal_type}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">Monthly Goal Allocation</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:3px;">$${sg_monthly}/mo</div>
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;opacity:.65;">Derived from your wealth plan above</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:2px solid ${sg_months_needed !== null ? '#27ae60' : '#e74c3c'};border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">Time to Goal</div>
    <div style="font-size:${sg_months_needed !== null ? '1.1' : '.85'}rem;font-weight:700;color:${sg_months_needed !== null ? '#27ae60' : '#e74c3c'};margin-top:3px;">${sg_months_text}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">Interest Earned</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;color:#27ae60;margin-top:3px;">$${sg_interest_earned.toLocaleString()}</div>
  </div>
</div>`

Plot.plot({
  title: "Emergency Fund Build-Up Over Time",
  subtitle: `Saving $${wb_emergency_monthly.toLocaleString()}/mo toward emergency reserves.`,
  width: 600,
  height: 280,
  x: {label: "Months →"},
  y: {label: "Emergency Fund Balance ($) →", tickFormat: d => `$${(d/1000).toFixed(0)}k`},
  color: {legend: true},
  marks: [
    Plot.line(milestones_tidy, {
      x: "month", y: "value", stroke: "series",
      strokeWidth: 2, tip: true
    }),
    Plot.ruleY([0])
  ]
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
sg_target_line = [{month: 0, balance: sg_target}, {month: sg_projection[sg_projection.length-1].month, balance: sg_target}]

Plot.plot({
  title: `${sg_goal_type} — Savings Projection`,
  subtitle: `$${sg_monthly}/mo at ${sg_rate}% APY, starting with $${sg_existing.toLocaleString()} saved`,
  width: 600,
  height: 300,
  x: {label: "Month →"},
  y: {label: "Balance ($) →", tickFormat: d => `$${(d/1000).toFixed(0)}k`},
  marks: [
    Plot.areaY(sg_projection, {
      x: "month", y: "balance",
      fill: "#27ae60", fillOpacity: 0.12
    }),
    Plot.line(sg_projection, {
      x: "month", y: "balance",
      stroke: "#27ae60", strokeWidth: 2.5, tip: true,
      title: d => `Month ${d.month}: $${d.balance.toLocaleString()}`
    }),
    Plot.line(sg_target_line, {
      x: "month", y: "balance",
      stroke: "#f39c12", strokeWidth: 2, strokeDash: [6, 3]
    }),
    Plot.text([{month: sg_projection[Math.floor(sg_projection.length/2)].month, balance: sg_target}], {
      x: "month", y: "balance", text: d => `🎯 Goal: $${sg_target.toLocaleString()}`,
      dy: -12, fill: "#f39c12", fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: 12
    }),
    sg_months_needed !== null ? Plot.dot(
      sg_projection.filter(d => d.month === sg_months_needed),
      {x: "month", y: "balance", fill: "#27ae60", r: 7, tip: true,
       title: d => `✅ Goal reached at month ${d.month}!\nBalance: $${d.balance.toLocaleString()}`}
    ) : null
  ].filter(Boolean)
})
```

#### 🏠 Shared Home Down Payment Timeline

This home-goal view is tied directly to your wealth plan above. Changing your **Roth IRA contribution, extra debt payment, savings rate, goal share, or secondary account choice** changes how much reaches the home fund each month here, and the same home target/progress follows you to [Family Planning](family_planning.qmd).

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
wb_home_monthly = Math.max(0, wb_goal_monthly)
wb_home_monthly_rate = wb_home_rate / 100 / 12

wb_home_months_needed = (() => {
  if (wb_home_existing >= wb_home_target) return 0;
  if (wb_home_monthly <= 0 && wb_home_monthly_rate <= 0) return null;
  let balance = wb_home_existing;
  for (let m = 1; m <= 600; m++) {
    balance = balance * (1 + wb_home_monthly_rate) + wb_home_monthly;
    if (balance >= wb_home_target) return m;
  }
  return null;
})()

wb_home_projection = Array.from({length: Math.min((wb_home_months_needed ?? 120) + 1, 361)}, (_, m) => {
  const growthFactor = Math.pow(1 + wb_home_monthly_rate, m);
  const principal = wb_home_existing + wb_home_monthly * m;
  const balance = wb_home_existing * growthFactor
    + (wb_home_monthly_rate > 0 ? wb_home_monthly * (growthFactor - 1) / wb_home_monthly_rate : wb_home_monthly * m);
  const interest = Math.round(Math.max(0, balance - principal));
  return {month: m, balance: Math.round(balance), principal: Math.round(principal), interest};
})

wb_home_months_text = wb_home_existing >= wb_home_target
  ? "Already funded"
  : wb_home_months_needed
    ? `${wb_home_months_needed} months (${(wb_home_months_needed / 12).toFixed(1)} years)`
    : "No room allocated yet — rebalance savings, debt, or investment choices above"

wb_home_interest_earned = wb_home_projection[wb_home_projection.length - 1]?.interest ?? 0
wb_home_target_line = [{month: 0, balance: wb_home_target}, {month: wb_home_projection[wb_home_projection.length - 1].month, balance: wb_home_target}]

html`<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(130px,1fr));gap:8px;margin:12px 0;">
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:2px solid #f39c12;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">Home Goal</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;color:#f39c12;margin-top:3px;">$${wb_home_target.toLocaleString()}</div>
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;opacity:.65;">Shared with Family Planning</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">Home Savings / Month</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;margin-top:3px;">$${wb_home_monthly}/mo</div>
    <div style="font-size:.72rem;opacity:.65;">From your budget + wealth allocation choices</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:2px solid ${wb_home_months_needed !== null ? '#27ae60' : '#e74c3c'};border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">Time to Down Payment</div>
    <div style="font-size:${wb_home_months_needed !== null ? '1.1' : '.85'}rem;font-weight:700;color:${wb_home_months_needed !== null ? '#27ae60' : '#e74c3c'};margin-top:3px;">${wb_home_months_text}</div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:12px 8px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.6;">Interest Earned</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;color:#27ae60;margin-top:3px;">$${wb_home_interest_earned.toLocaleString()}</div>
  </div>
</div>`

Plot.plot({
  title: "Shared Home Down Payment Projection",
  subtitle: `$${wb_home_monthly}/mo at ${wb_home_rate}% APY, starting with $${wb_home_existing.toLocaleString()} saved`,
  width: 600,
  height: 300,
  x: {label: "Month →"},
  y: {label: "Balance ($) →", tickFormat: d => `$${(d / 1000).toFixed(0)}k`},
  marks: [
    Plot.areaY(wb_home_projection, {
      x: "month", y: "balance",
      fill: "#3498db", fillOpacity: 0.14
    }),
    Plot.line(wb_home_projection, {
      x: "month", y: "balance",
      stroke: "#3498db", strokeWidth: 2.5, tip: true,
      title: d => `Month ${d.month}: $${d.balance.toLocaleString()}`
    }),
    Plot.line(wb_home_target_line, {
      x: "month", y: "balance",
      stroke: "#f39c12", strokeWidth: 2, strokeDash: [6, 3]
    }),
    Plot.text([{month: wb_home_projection[Math.floor(wb_home_projection.length / 2)].month, balance: wb_home_target}], {
      x: "month", y: "balance", text: d => `🏠 Goal: $${wb_home_target.toLocaleString()}`,
      dy: -12, fill: "#f39c12", fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: 12
    }),
    wb_home_months_needed !== null ? Plot.dot(
      wb_home_projection.filter(d => d.month === wb_home_months_needed),
      {x: "month", y: "balance", fill: "#27ae60", r: 7, tip: true,
       title: d => `🏠 Goal reached at month ${d.month}!\nBalance: $${d.balance.toLocaleString()}`}
    ) : null
  ].filter(Boolean)
})
```

### 🧾 Account Options & Debt Strategy

Use the controls above to set your monthly contributions to **Roth IRA, 403(b), HSA, and 529 plan** — each independently, up to the annual maximum. You can also allocate savings to accelerated loan payoff and your current savings goal.

| Account Type | Who Can Contribute | 2024 Limit | Tax Treatment | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Roth IRA** | Anyone with earned income (W-2 or qualifying fellowship income) under income limits | $7,000/yr ($8,000 if 50+) | Contributions post-tax; growth & withdrawals tax-free | Best option for most grad students in a low tax bracket |
| **403(b)** | University employees (TA/RA) | $23,000/yr ($1,917/mo) | Pre-tax contributions; taxed on withdrawal | Prioritize if your university offers a match |
| **HSA** | Students enrolled in a qualifying high-deductible health plan | $4,150/yr individual ($346/mo); $8,300/yr family | Pre-tax contributions; tax-free growth and qualified medical withdrawals | Triple tax advantage; great if your campus plan is HSA-eligible |
| **529 plan** | Anyone saving for education expenses | No federal annual contribution cap (gift-tax rules apply) | Growth is tax-free when used for qualified education expenses | Most relevant for students with children or long-term education goals |

> **Fellowship students:** IRS guidance on whether fellowship income qualifies as "earned income" for IRA purposes has evolved. As of 2023, qualified stipends can count. Consult [IRS Publication 590-A](https://www.irs.gov/publications/p590a) or a tax professional.

If you carry undergraduate loans into graduate school:

- **Federal loans are typically deferred** during enrollment (in-school deferment), but interest may continue accruing on unsubsidized loans.
- Consider **paying interest only** during graduate school to prevent capitalization.
- Use the **Minimum Loan Payments** field in the Budget Planner above to include your fixed monthly obligation in your Needs budget.
- Use the **extra student-loan payment** control above to compare faster debt payoff against goal savings or account contributions.
- Research **income-driven repayment (IDR)** plans: SAVE, PAYE, IBR. These cap payments at a percentage of discretionary income, which can be very low (or $0) on a grad stipend.
- **Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF):** If you plan to work at a nonprofit or government employer after graduation, payments during grad school can count toward the 120 required for PSLF (if you are on an IDR plan and not in deferment). Contact your servicer to verify.

**Tools:**

- [Federal Student Aid Loan Simulator](https://studentaid.gov/loan-simulator/)
- [PSLF Help Tool](https://studentaid.gov/pslf/)

:::

### Additional Resources

- [r/GradSchool (Reddit)](https://www.reddit.com/r/GradSchool/) — community discussions
- [The PhD Student's Guide to Personal Finance (NerdWallet)](https://www.nerdwallet.com/)
- [Bogleheads Wiki: Getting Started](https://www.bogleheads.org/wiki/Getting_started) — low-cost index fund investing
- [Personal Finance for PhDs (blog)](https://pfforphds.com/) — tax and finance advice specifically for graduate students
- [IRS Free File](https://www.irs.gov/filing/free-file-do-your-federal-taxes-for-free) — free federal tax filing

---

*Last reviewed: 2024. Contribution limits and tax rules change annually — verify current figures at [IRS.gov](https://www.irs.gov/).*
